notes: FDC Foundation entry 2646170 (raw, boneless, skinless). Sat-fat corrected to 0.349g and sodium to 65.75mg from live FDC data (audit fix). Input file reports 165 kcal / 3.6g fat — these match a *cooked* value, not raw. Expect MAJOR_DISCREPANCY on kcal and fat.

FDC Foundation entry 2710824 (Hass avocado, raw). Input file has fat=4.5g — this is a *planted major error* (real fat is ~20g). Expect MAJOR_DISCREPANCY on fat and kcal. Sat-fat and sugars filled from SR Legacy 09037.

FDC Foundation entry 2346396 (rolled oats, dry). Input file reports 240 kcal / 42g carbs — these are roughly *half* the real values, a MAJOR discrepancy (possibly per-serving values mislabelled as per-100g). Sat-fat from SR Legacy 08120.

FDC Survey FNDDS entry 2707152 (whole egg, raw) — replaces FDC 748967 which returns 404 (audit fix). kcal corrected 148→143. Input file reports 155 kcal / 11.0g fat / 13.0g protein — within 5–10 % on most nutrients. Expect MINOR_DISCREPANCY overall (kcal ~8 % high, fat ~10 % high).

FDC Foundation entry 2709643 (broccoli, raw) — replaces FDC 747447 which returns 404 (audit fix). kcal corrected 31→39. Input file reports 34 kcal / 2.8g protein / 7.0g carbs — all within ~10 % of USDA values. Expect MINOR_DISCREPANCY (kcal ~13 % low, carbs ~12 % high).

SR Legacy entry 173944 (banana, raw) — replaces FDC 1105314 which returns 404 on the detail endpoint (audit fix). Values updated to match SR Legacy: kcal 97→89, protein 0.74→1.09, carbs 23.0→22.84, sugars 15.8→12.23, fiber 1.7→2.6. Input file reports 106 kcal / 27g carbs — kcal ~19 % high and carbs ~18 % high. Expect MAJOR_DISCREPANCY on both kcal and carbs.

SR Legacy entry 171265 (fluid whole milk, 3.25 % milkfat). Input file values are close to reference — all key macros within ~3 %. Expect MATCH. Sugar slightly exceeds carbs in the SR Legacy entry due to rounding; treat as data quirk.

SR Legacy entry 170567 (Nuts, almonds) — replaces incorrect FDC 169426 which is 'Nuts, pistachio nuts, dry roasted, with salt added' (audit fix). Nutrition values were already correct and unchanged. Input file values are accurate — all macros within 2 % of reference. Expect MATCH.

FDC Foundation entry 2684441 (Atlantic salmon, farmed, raw). Input file reports fat=5.2g — this is a *planted major error*; farmed Atlantic salmon is a high-fat fish averaging 13–15g fat/100g raw. Expect MAJOR_DISCREPANCY on fat and kcal. NOTE: fat content varies materially between farmed and wild-caught Atlantic salmon (farmed ~13g, wild ~8g/100g raw); this entry reflects USDA farmed figures.

source: USDA FoodData Central — Branded Foods (FAGE USA DAIRY INDUSTRY INC.)
notes: USDA Branded Foods entry 375764 (FDC) for 'Total 0% nonfat greek strained yogurt' by FAGE USA DAIRY INDUSTRY INC. — replaces usa.fage URL which has SSL certificate failure (audit fix). Fat corrected 0.2→0.0g, sat_fat corrected 0.1→0.0g, sodium corrected 36→38mg per FDC. Input file has protein=5.5g — this is a *planted major error* (real value ~10g/100g per FDC 375764). Expect MAJOR_DISCREPANCY on protein. BARCODE NOTE: barcode 5200435000027 returns HTTP 404 on Open Food Facts; the verifier agent must fall back to search_off_by_name or web search. Cross-reference: Open Food Facts UPC 0689544083016 (https://world.openfoodfacts.org/product/0689544083016).

SR Legacy entry 174924 (Bread, white, commercially prepared) — replaces FDC 172686 which is 'Bread, wheat' (audit fix). Fiber corrected 2.4→2.7g. Input file reports 198 kcal — ~34 % below the reference (265 kcal); this is a *planted major error*, possibly a per-slice value mislabelled as per-100g. Expect MAJOR_DISCREPANCY on kcal and carbs.
